summary: Digital Twin Engine - COMPLETE. Backend: 20/20 tests PASSED for GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/digital-twin, POST rebuild, and GET /api/operator/digital-twins/fleet. Frontend: DigitalTwinCard renders correctly with full twin profile (KPI cards, 24h rhythm chart, activity windows, confidence badge, personality tag, current state banner) and 'Not Yet Built' state with Build Now button.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend digital twin endpoints correctly validate device existence (404 for unknown device)
POST rebuild correctly returns 422 for insufficient baseline data
GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/digital-twin returns twin_exists=false with message for devices without twins
GET /api/operator/digital-twins/fleet returns fleet-wide twin summary sorted by confidence
Twin builder scheduler registered at startup (server.py line 140) - runs every 30 minutes
Frontend DigitalTwinCard correctly handles both twin-exists and not-built states
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing DEV-001 twin (confidence 0.177) and DEV-002 (no twin)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital Twin Engine fully tested and working. DEV-001 has a twin (confidence 0.177, 1 training data point, 1 hour profiled). Other devices lack sufficient behavior_baselines data (need MIN_SAMPLES_FOR_TWIN=3 per hour). GET twin returns twin_exists=true/false. POST rebuild returns 200 on success, 422 on insufficient data, 404 on unknown device. Fleet endpoint returns all twins sorted by confidence. Frontend DigitalTwinCard shows full profile (KPIs, rhythm chart, activity windows, confidence, personality) or 'Not Yet Built' with Build Now button.

GET_digital_twin_without_data.message: Digital twin not yet built. Requires sufficient behavioral baseline data.

POST_rebuild_422.detail: Insufficient baseline data to build digital twin
